name: http-server-skeleton
description: src/server/ split: types.ts (wire envelopes), router.ts (pure pattern match ‚Äî compilePattern + matchRoute, no I/O), errors.ts (BurrowError‚ÜíHTTP status mapping), response.ts (json/ndjson constructors), routes.ts (route table ‚Äî every endpoint mirrors a src/lib/client.ts namespace 1:1), server.ts (Bun.serve fetch loop, dispatch, error rendering). Pure router is the testability seam; integration tests target server.ts. Route table mirrors Client namespaces so HTTP layer can't drift from Library API.

content: BurrowError subclass ‚Üí HTTP status mapping in src/server/errors.ts renderError(): NotFoundError‚Üí404, ValidationError‚Üí400, CredentialError‚Üí401, ToolchainMismatch‚Üí409, AgentNotInstalled‚Üí424, AgentRuntimeError/SandboxError/SecretResolutionError‚Üí502, plain Error‚Üí500. Sister table to CLI exitCodeFor (mx-2362a5) ‚Äî keep them aligned when adding new error classes.

Router distinguishes 404 vs 405 via pathExists(): if any route in the table matches the pathname for any method, return 405 method_not_allowed; otherwise 404 not_found. Trailing slashes are stripped (except for the bare root '/') so /burrows and /burrows/ resolve identically. Param values are decodeURIComponent'd at match time.
